name: Doxycycline may increase warfarin effect
actions: Use caution when doxycycline is combined with warfarin.
Monitor for increased anticoagulant effect or bleeding risk (educational).

rationale: Doxycycline may potentiate warfarin anticoagulant effect.
Combined use may increase bleeding risk.

explanation_template: {A_name} may increase the effect of {B_name}, which can increase bleeding risk.
